options.B: A declaration of assets, liabilities and net worth

options.B: Merit and fitness through competitive examinations

questions.question: Which characteristic distinguishes the Non-Career Service?

options.B: Tenure limited to a specified period or coterminous with the appointing authority

options.D: It can be subject of a contract

options.B: The appointee accepts by taking an oath of office

questions.question: According to security of tenure, appointments are classified as:

Nonfeasance refers to:

options.A: Doing an act one had no legal right to perform
options.B: The neglect or refusal to perform a legal obligation
options.C: Failure to use proper care and skill in duty

questions.question: Misfeasance refers to the failure to use the required degree of:

options.B: Care, skill and diligence in performing official duty

questions.question: Malfeasance is doing, through ignorance, inattention or malice, an act which the officer:

options.A: Had a legal right to perform
options.B: Had no legal right to perform

options.B: A disciplinary preventive measure during investigation

questions.question: Which of the following is a requisite for a valid resignation?

options.B: It must be voluntary and accepted by the proper officer

options.C: 20 days vacation and 20 days sick leave
options.D: 5 days vacation and 5 days sick leave

options.B: Total accumulated leave credits upon retirement or separation
